metadata.description: OpenProse — a programming language for AI sessions that structures English into unambiguous control flow for multi-agent orchestration

plugins.name: open-prose
plugins.description: Runs Markdown contracts as multi-agent programs. When the user invokes `prose`, you read the contract, spawn subagents, pass artifacts between them, and write run state to `.prose/runs/`. Requires a subagent primitive; single-service programs run inline.
